data.title: As a sprint orchestrator, I want sprint SKILL.md to handle UNCERTAIN completion-verifier verdicts with opus re-dispatch before blocking stories
data.description:
As a sprint orchestrator, I need sprint SKILL.md to route UNCERTAIN completion-verifier verdicts to an opus re-dispatch loop so that story closure confidence is maximized before stories are blocked or escalated.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- sprint SKILL.md Step 10a: UNCERTAIN branch added after PASS branch — re-dispatch completion-verifier with model: opus; if opus verdict = PASS → proceed normally; if opus verdict = UNCERTAIN → tag story story:blocked + add ticket comment "Completion verifier UNCERTAIN: <verifier uncertainty summary>"; story is NOT closed; await implementer resolution
- sprint SKILL.md Phase 6 Step 0.75 (epic closure): same UNCERTAIN branch logic applied to epic-level completion-verifier dispatch
- "blocked flag" definition: ticket tag story:blocked + ticket comment documenting verifier uncertainty summary from dso:completion-verifier output
- HARD-GATE text at Step 10a updated: "Only overall_verdict: PASS or UNCERTAIN (routed to opus), or technical failure permits proceeding past this step"
- Existing tests/skills/ that test PASS/FAIL routing updated to include UNCERTAIN branch behavior
- Task descriptions explicitly name sprint SKILL.md as target (rule 18 authorization); sprint SKILL.md is a safeguard file

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Safeguard] sprint SKILL.md is in plugins/dso/skills/sprint/ — safeguard file per rule 18; task descriptions must explicitly name it
- [Sequence] O depends on M — M must define UNCERTAIN in completion-verifier.md before sprint SKILL.md can reference it
- [Scope] opus re-dispatch loop is bounded to one retry (sonnet UNCERTAIN → opus re-dispatch; opus UNCERTAIN → blocked, not another retry); prevents infinite UNCERTAIN loops
